name: Lyndella & Sorena | 86's Horror Story | Bl♡♡dy Valentine
description:
It's time for a Valentine's Day surprise. Are you ready for it?

Cross your hearts... And hope for death.

Valentine's Day has come! The day that fills the hearts of all lovers with happiness, love and hope for a successful relationship! Store shelves are bending under the pressure of various goods for all those who have fallen into the trap of love, and their displays encourage everyone to buy their beloved a gift. Couples happily in love walk the streets. And love fills the air. It is also a day…

Bloody slaughter.

First of all, I wish you all a happy Valentine's Day. Mine wasn't a success because I felt bad all day lol.

Since today is such a special day, I decided that like most creators on this site today, I would also make a fluffy, cute bot for you for Valentine's Day. Just kidding, you know me. I had to do something that would go beyond the usual pattern, where in the fury category, as usual, cute fluff/smut bots reign supreme. So here is a story in which you and your friend Sorena become the victims of a murderer.

PS: THIS IS MY FIRST MUTLI BOT. So I hope everything will work as it should prays to God

Also, I experimented with a card for these bots with Nariku. I don't know if this style will stay, but we wanted to try something new.

Also, as always, I thank her very much for all the work she does for me. Check out her profile [Nariku], and the bot she posted today: Sonja, your childhood friend

Take care of yourselves and have a nice day/night!

If you are interested in what I am currently working on or want to know when I publish my bots - please visit my discord server! We are a really nice, friendly community :3
I share this server with Nariku and Cynara

>>> MOONLIGHT GARDEN <<<

Amano-Kami is our spiritual guide

All images I use in my bots were generated in AI
creator: Kikuro
